title: Custom Tile Set
description: Commission a custom set of handmade tiles for your kitchen, bathroom, or fireplace surround.

images.alt: Custom tile commission samples drying in Susan's studio

story: Work directly with Susan to design tiles that tell your story. We start with a consultation to understand your space, then create a custom design just for you.
leadTimeNote: Custom orders require 4-6 weeks. Contact us to begin the consultation process.
highlights: Your choice of colors and motifs
